notes: HVAC residential service (NAICS 238220, ACR Class A/B). Spine derived from TDLR ACR roster + live website verification; PE-platform exclusion checks against Apex Service Partners, Wrench Group, Service Champions, Sila, Reedy, ARS/Rescue Rooter, ABC Home & Commercial, Morrison Plumbing & Mechanical.
